data_description.pid_kp: Determines how fast the system reacts to current temp error. Normal: 2.0 - 5.0.
data_description.pid_ki: Corrects long-term steady-state error. Very sensitive! Normal: 0.01 - 0.05.
data_description.pid_integral_clamp: Prevents the integrator from building up too much energy (windup). Normal: 5.0 - 10.0.
data_description.pid_output_clamp: The maximum degrees the PID is allowed to adjust the pump setpoint.
data_description.pid_integrator_on_brake: What happens to the 'memory' when the price is high? 'Freeze' is usually safest.
data_description.pi_price_feedforward_gain: How much the electricity price affects the pump before a temp drop occurs.
data_description.brake_ramp_in_minutes: How many minutes to transition from normal operation to full brake. Protects the compressor.
data_description.experimental_ml_enabled: Uses historical data to learn your house's thermal inertia automatically.

error.invalid_range: Min brake strength cannot be higher than max brake strength
